name: ComfyUI-MultiGPU
description: This custom_node for ComfyUI adds one-click "Virtual VRAM" for any UNet and CLIP loader as well MultiGPU integration in WanVideoWrapper, managing the offload/Block Swap of layers to DRAM *or* VRAM to maximize the latent space of your card. Also includes nodes for directly loading entire components (UNet, CLIP, VAE) onto the device you choose
